name: Branches Against the Blue Sky
description: A mechanical flower that never withers. It is a favored indoor bonsai ornament among the Ratniki.\n"No time to care for it... no sunlight... can't even dig up a shovelful of soil!"\nImagine the delight of the Ratniki when a particularly crafty member among them created this fairly decent-looking ornament after tinkering with some scrap materials. The blue color of this ornament, reminiscent of the sky, is also a hue that those who have long spent their waking hours in the night long to see.
